{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017353751379991B822CA10E93F"}"},"total":271},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7598960720198222654","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有必要也顺带夸下作者笔下的女主，有思想有灵魂，非典型完美角色，会容易跟女主共情，目前写的几个短篇角色塑造都很成功。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769272771,"group_id":"7582780060722007064","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4004867705930921"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582780060722007064","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5126,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7597804951343170366","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"节奏快，剧情爽。这个题材很多都是为了人设给男主套上了一个“病娇”“疯子”的皮套，没有底层逻辑，导致同质化特别严重。这本每篇都用片断性的笔墨隐约塑造了男主为什么会变成这样，又不过多展开原生家庭的痛啊之类，看着很省心，推荐","text_exts":[{"e":46,"s":42,"text":"底层逻辑","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BA%95%E5%B1%82%E9%80%BB%E8%BE%91&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773999337CA10E93F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227597804951343170366%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227582780060722007064%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BA%95%E5%B1%82%E9%80%BB%E8%BE%91%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769004654,"group_id":"7582780060722007064","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"尊重每一个作者的创作，但不代表啥我都吃","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1OJIS90tcWadqDJu58KkVya4Thd/ayBcmyHQGAhe2Jb","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b107431df5e74f42a881784214a40f03~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536646&x-signature=MX7YYQf7fgVT8lJOj%2FU2V5L88XI%3D","user_id":"4004867705930921","user_name":"吃不饱的文文"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4004867705930921","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582780060722007064","book_info":{"abstract":"短篇单元/第二人称/黑化病娇/内含强制/勿带入三观
                     **重口味**猎奇**
故事一：【阴湿男鬼丈夫他vs边界感很强妻子你】
一句话简介：你只想要一个相敬如宾的丈夫，可他爱你爱得要疯掉了。
故事二：【天生坏种学生他vs比他更坏的家教你】
一句话简介：见到他的第一眼起，你就知道，这种恶犬只能用巴掌管教。
故事三：【甩掉那个嚣张偏执的疯狗富二代】
两句话简介：1.他和他哥会身体力行地告诉你，逃走的代价。2.相依为命的亲兄弟就是要争到头破血流
故事四：【x瘾反社会倾向少爷他vs天真无邪小女仆你】
一句话简介：世界上只有一种瘾症——对爱对狂热幻想
故事五：【真女人从不追夫火葬场】
一句话简介：“我不会爱你，不会和你结婚或者给你任何名分，不会和你共享我的财产、权利，甚至不能保证最后会不会把你踹掉，即使是这样，你也坚持要留在我身边吗？”

……
